---
name: Feature request
about: An idea to make bohay better
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
What are you trying to do that bohay makes hard or impossible today?

**What would you like to happen?**
Describe the feature — a keybinding, a CLI command, a UI change, …

**Alternatives**
Could this live as a [module](https://github.com/RizRiyz/bohay/blob/main/MODULE-GUIDE.md)
instead of core? Anything you use today as a workaround?
